name: io.github.sathvic-kollu/techtenstein-seo
description: On-page SEO audit for any URL. Get title, meta, headings, word count, alt coverage, link ratios, and score. Powered by Techtenstein SEO Audit API.

environmentVariables.description: API key from https://apis.techtenstein.com (free tier: 100 audits/day)
environmentVariables.name: TECHTENSTEIN_API_KEY
